residual_risks.title: Router-level regression tests may not execute if repository test selection excludes the new file
residual_risks.mitigation: Check remote status and, if needed, wire the new test file into the current test invocation strategy.

residual_risks.title: Provider may return valid JSON in non-text multimodal parts that are intentionally ignored by the new coercion logic
residual_risks.mitigation: Prefer explicit text output for memory extraction prompts; extend coercion only if a provider is confirmed to embed structured output elsewhere.

residual_risks.title: No in-workspace local runner was available for execution verification
residual_risks.mitigation: Rely on GitHub combined status and follow up on any failed or missing checks before merge.
